title: Advanced reported speech
explanation:
Advanced reported speech

At B2 level, use a wide range of reporting verbs and structures: advise + gerund, warn + not to, deny + gerund, accuse + of, passive reporting (He was said to be ...).

questions.text: She advised me [*to apply|applying|apply] for the scholarship.
The guide warned us [*not to touch|to not touch|not touching] the exhibits.
He denied [*taking|to take|take] the money from the till.
They accused her [*of lying|to lie|lie] in the interview.
The journalist was reported [*to have resigned|resigning|resigned] the previous day.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: The teacher encouraged the students ____ questions. | *to ask | asking | ask
He apologised ____ late. | *for arriving | to arrive | arriving to
She reminded me ____ the documents. | *to bring | bring | bringing
The company is believed ____ planning major job cuts. | *to be | being | be
The witness claimed [*to have seen|seeing|seen] the suspect near the station.
They insisted on [*paying|to pay|pay] for dinner themselves.
He threatened [*to report|reporting|report] them to the police.
She was said [*to be|being|be] one of the best surgeons in the country.
The manager refused [*to discuss|discussing|discuss] salaries in public.
